meta.attribution: Jamieson, Fausset & Brown (1871), Christian Classics Ethereal Library
meta.notes: Short excerpts only. Full commentary available via external link.

John 5:39.summary: The Scriptures are the appointed witness to Christ; searching them leads to the knowledge of eternal life in him.
John 5:39.excerpt: Search the scriptures — implying that the Jews professed to derive their hope of eternal life from them. They are they which testify of me — not that they testify of nothing else, but that their principal scope is to bear witness to the Messiah.

Romans 8:28.summary: God sovereignly works all circumstances together for the good of those who love him and are called according to his purpose.
Romans 8:28.excerpt: And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to his purpose — not all things without exception, but all things that befall the children of God are overruled by Him for their good.
